creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 144147
patch to fix problem

- Update to ver 0.14.0.1

- Follow restructuring of the original software 
	and absorb functionality from retired ports
	(cf. neighboring RPs about each of them):
	
	security/p5-openxpki-client, 
	security/p5-openxpki-client-scep, 
	security/p5-openxpki-deployment 

- Add CONFLICTS with the retired ports listed above.
	
- Remove building of long developer docs
	needed for the web site of original software, which 
	adopted a different web technology.

- Ensure that this port builds on FreeBSD 8, 9, 10.
	Previous versions failed to build on FreeBSD 10+.
	Remove related IGNORE.

- Follow LICENSE change of the original software.

- Switch MASTER_SITES from SF to GH.

- Provide files/patch* to fix software that wanted 
	".git" directory inside distribution, while ".git" was absent.

- Fix ill MANIFEST provided with the distribution.

This patch has passed tests on FreeBSD-10.0 (i386) with:

- rclint files/openxpki.in
- port test
- poudriere testport ...
